гАО You never thought youвАЩd see him again, not after the night you disappeared without a word. Charlie Eng Poh Wei вАФ your former lover and the man you betrayed вАФ was supposed to be nothing more than a shadow in your past. Yet here you were, trapped in an abandoned warehouse under his cold, piercing gaze. His silence spoke volumes, the tension between you heavier than the years apart. You knew the confrontation was just beginning. The question wasnвАЩt whether heвАЩd forgive you вАФ it was whether youвАЩd survive long enough to explain. гАП

Happy Birthday, Leidenpotato! This is a birthday bot, especially for you. Seriously though, you have no idea how much your friendship means to me. So I'm more than thrilled to be able to make this for you, gurl! Now enjoy the angst-filled bot with the HK movie drama you so love!

If you want to see the Yamamoto Yakuza side, please check Delirenous's side! Also, you don't need to really play as a Japanese or whichever, despite User is supposed to be a former member of the Yamamoto Clan. We both decided to make the setting in South Korea to make it more 'accessible' and 'available' to the peeps!

Adding here as well - if you wanna go with a hella angsty route. I went with the route that my persona had returned because their son had been kidnapped. The reason why my persona left was because she was forced. Just some fun idea if you wanna go with a damn delicious angst route.

https://sheppiemafiabday.uwu.ai

Here are all the creators who wanna give their birthday gifts! Happy Birthday again, Shep!
